titles.title: The Message of the Wounded Dove

properties.verseOrder: V1 V2 C3 V4 C3 V5 C3 V6 C3

verse.name: V1
verse.lines: From the outer regions of the lost God has brought us back Her gates are the gates of hell And many enter therein Then at last we heard a great blast The thunders uttering

verse.name: V2
verse.lines: This time they spoke clearly The mystery of the Seventh Seal Here we are in the second fold Of a three fold mystery Part being spoken by the Son of man But the other in you and me

verse.name: C3
verse.lines: The message of the wounded dove went forth Now it's come back again In the power of the Word, Speaking resurrection Speaking rapturing faith Full redemption, from a fallen state

verse.name: V4
verse.lines: With the power that will judge the earth We are lifted higher Higher and higher until we all come Into that Seventh peak And from there we'll change dimensions Crossing to that other land Where we'll meet friends and love ones And those who've already gone

verse.name: V5
verse.lines: A window now is opened And the light is shining through Celestial light from a celestial world Shining into our soul The raven and the dove is loosed Two powers in the earth One feeding on the flesh of disobedient man But the dove in you and me

verse.name: V6
verse.lines: And for this purpose He's descended A full cycle of time about ended But here we stand in this reality While Nehemiah was a coded mystery
